_provenance: hand-derived; synthetic series with exactly 29 overlapping observations (one below the thin-data threshold of 30)
_derivation: series_x has 29 observations: alternating +0.01 and -0.01. series_y is identical (copy). Pearson r(x,y) = 1.0 exactly. n_obs = 29. thin_data = true because 29 < 30 (threshold from Bailey/de-Prado 2014 interpretability floor, same _V1_BOOTSTRAP_MIN_DAYS used elsewhere in the codebase).

expected_pair._comment: 29 obs < 30 threshold — result is valid but must be flagged thin
